raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Zekanijus Jojakuna
Dehlu/ to Kehnizu no Juhda/
un wiſſus Aiswestus no Juhda/
kas uhs Babeli irr nahkuschi/
atweddifchu es us fcho Weetu/
fakka tas KUNGS: Jo es fa-
lansifchu to Juhgu ta Kehniza
no Babels.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Praweets
Jeremijus uhs to Praweetu Ka-
nantju/ preekſch to Preesteru/ un
wiſſu Lauschu Azzim/ kas tur
stahweja eekſch ta KUNGA
Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Jeremi-
jus fazzija: Amen. Laï tas
KUNGS ta darra/ laï tas
KUNGS tawus Wahrđus ap-
stiprina/ ko tu effi fluddinajs /
la wiꞥſch atwed tohs Rihkus ta
Deewa Namna / un wiſſus
Aiswestus no Babels attat us
fcho Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr klaufi jelle tcho
Wahrđu/ko es runnaſchu preekſch
tawahm Aufim/ un preekſch
wiſſu Lauschu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Praweeschi/ kas
preekſch mannis/ un vreekſch te-
wis irr bijuschi muhscham/
tee
irr prett dauds Seminehm / un
leelahm Walstibahm fluddinaj-
fchi no Kaxta/ un no Nelaimi-
bas/ un no Mehra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Praweets/ kas
Meern fluddina/ tas pats Pra-
weets taps atsihts/ ka tas KUNGS
winnu irr teescham fuhttjs/ kad
tas Wahrđs tam Praweetam
nahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme tas Praweets
Kanantjus to Juhgu no ta Pra-
weeta Jeremijus Katla/ un fa-
lause to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Kananijus runnaja
preekſch wiſſu Lauschu Azzim/
un fazzija: Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Tapatt falansifchu es to Juhgu
NebukadNezara/ ta Kehniza no
Babels/ pirns diwi Gaddi pa
Gallam buhs/ no ta Katla wiſ-
fu Lauschu. Un tas Praweets
Jeremijus gabje fawn Zettu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad notikke ta KUNGA
Wahrđs us Jeremiju/ pehz ka
Kanantjus tas Praweets to Juḫ-
gu btj falansis no ta Prawee-
ta Jeremijus Katla/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eij/ un runna uhs Kana-
niju/ un fakki: Ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Kohka Juhgus effi
tu launsis/ bet winnu Weeta dar-
rischu es Dselesß Juhgus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëta Deews:
Weenu Dseles Juhgu efmu es
wiﬀeem scheein Laudim ap Kaklu
lizzis/ ka teem buhs kalpoht Ne-
bukadNezaram tam Kehnixam
no Babels/ un teem buhs win-
xam kalpoht/ jo ir tohs Sweh-
rus Lauka etmu es winnam de-
wis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Jere-
mijus fazzija uhs to Praweetu
Kanantju: Klaust jelle Kanani-
jus: Tas KUNGS tevi ne irr
tuhtijs/ un tu effi darrijs/ ka
schee Landis uhs Melleem pa-
laischahs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
